detail: Clone has only two intersecting lines (no parallel lines, no transversal). A1 requires explicit parallel-lines + transversal; this is A6 (vertical angles at a single intersection). T3 easy lever requires 'two parallel lines, one transversal, all four angles labeled.'

Easy lever requires 'both given angles are explicit integer measures' with answer = 180 - g1 - g2. Clone gives only one angle (J=48) and asks 'which could be K,' requiring an inequality check (K<132) — that matches the medium lever, not easy.
